case_title: CACH LLC VS. GARY C WONG

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH LLC AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, GARY C SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-21-2007 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-19-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-06-2007
